Checking in on this one — entries are due Wednesday, so we would need the additional information by tomorrow morning (March 31) to move forward.

No worries if you decide to skip this one this year, but wanted to check in one more time!

C
items.ai_summary: Candace Sipos from JSA is following up on DCR Excellence Award entries with an urgent deadline—submissions are due Wednesday and she needs additional information by tomorrow morning (March 31) to include Galaxy's entry. She's giving Dave/the team a final opportunity to decide whether to participate this year.
ai_next_steps: Confirm by end of business today whether Galaxy wants to submit an entry for the DCR Excellence Awards
If yes, gather and send required information to Candace by March 31 morning
If no, notify Candace promptly so she can plan accordingly
